title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
